zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Camell Lady of Fiddleford於1440年出生在英國多瑟特沙維其可時，她的父親Sir John Camell56歲，母親Isabella Sybil Paveley57歲。她於1463年與Renaud Lempriere在英國英格蘭多瑟特沙維其可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1505年1月1日在英國賀特福爾阿爾布瑞享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine Camell Lady of Fiddleford于1440年出生在英国多瑟特沙維其可时，她的父亲Sir John Camell56岁，母亲Isabella Sybil Paveley57岁。她于1463年与Renaud Lempriere在英国英格兰多瑟特沙維其可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1505年1月1日在英国賀特福爾阿爾布瑞享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Camell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cammell
meanings: 1 Norman, English: nickname from Norman French came(i)l ‘camel’ (Latin camelus, classical Greek kamēlos). In the 1332 example this is clearly a nickname, possibly denoting a clumsy or ill-tempered person, as in ‘Achilles? A drayman, a porter, a very camel’ (Shakespeare: Troilus and Cressida I ii 249). The other forms could alternatively belong at (2) below.
2  English: locative name from Queen Camel or West Camel (Somerset).
3 English: nickname; there has also been some confusion with Campbell , sometimes pronounced as Camel.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Camell Lady of Fiddleford was born in 1440, in Shapwick, Dorset, England, her father, Sir John Camell, was 56 and her mother, Isabella Sybil Paveley, was 57. She married Renaud Lempriere in 1463, in Shapwick, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 1 January 1505, in Albury, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine Camell Lady of Fiddleford est née en 1440, à Shapwick, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Camell, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Isabella Sybil Paveley, avait 57 ans. Elle a épousé Renaud Lempriere en 1463, à Shapwick, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 1 janvier 1505, à Albury, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine Camell Lady of Fiddleford 1440 in Shapwick, Dorset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Camell 56 und ihre Mutter Isabella Sybil Paveley 57. Sie hat 1463 in Shapwick, Dorset, England, United Kingdom Renaud Lempriere geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 1. Januar 1505 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Albury, Hertfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Camell Lady of Fiddleford è nata il nel 1440 nel Shapwick, Dorset, England, sua padre, Sir John Camell, aveva 56 anni e sua madre, Isabella Sybil Paveley, aveva 57 anni. Lei sposato Renaud Lempriere nel 1463, nel Shapwick, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 1 gennaio 1505, nel Albury, Hertfordshire, England, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Camell Lady of Fiddlefordが1440年にイギリスドールセトシャプウィックで生まれた時，父Sir John Camellは56歳，母Isabella Sybil Paveleyは57歳であった。1463年にイギリスイギリスドールセトシャプウィックでRenaud Lempriereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1505年1月1日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアアルブリーで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Camell Lady of Fiddleford(이)가 1440년 영국 도르세트 샤p윅에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Camell(은)는 56세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella Sybil Paveley(은)는 57세였다. 그녀는 1463년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 샤p윅에서 Renaud Lempriere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1505년 1월 1일 영국 허트퍼드실르 알버이에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Camell Lady of Fiddleford nasceu em 1440, em Shapwick, Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Camell, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Sybil Paveley, tinha 57 anos. Ela casou-se com Renaud Lempriere em 1463, em Shapwick, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1 de janeiro de 1505, em Albury, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Camell Lady of Fiddleford родилась в 1440 г. в местности шапвикк, дорсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Camell было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella Sybil Paveley, 57. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Renaud Lempriere в 1463 г. в местности шапвикк, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 1 января 1505 г. в местности албури, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Catherine Camell Lady of Fiddleford nació en 1440, en Shapwick, Dorset, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Camell, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Isabella Sybil Paveley, tenía 57 años. Se casó con Renaud Lempriere en 1463, en Shapwick, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 1 de enero de 1505, en Albury, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 65 años.
